@abhimanyu.Name: Abhimanyu
Character_Arc: Learned Chakravyuha entry in the womb

@ashvatthama.Name: Ashvatthama
Character_Arc: Cursed by Krishna to wander 3000 years

@balarama.Name: Balarama
Character_Arc: Trained Duryodhana and Bhima in mace
Angered at Bhima's foul blow to Duryodhana

@bhima.Name: Bhima
Character_Arc: Served as cook Ballava in Virata

@bhishma.Name: Bhishma
Character_Arc: Born to Shantanu and Ganga - 8th Vasu
Abducted Amba, Ambika, Ambalika for Vichitravirya
Served as regent of Hastinapura across generations
Shot by Arjuna using Shikhandi as shield

@dhritarashtra.Name: Dhritarashtra
Character_Arc: Born blind via Niyoga from Vyasa
Passed over for throne due to blindness

@draupadi.Name: Draupadi
Character_Arc: Born from sacrificial fire of Drupada
Humiliated in dice game - vowed vengeance

@drona.Name: Drona
Character_Arc: Born from pot (drona) to sage Bharadvaja
Captured Drupada - took half his kingdom
Killed by Dhrishtadyumna after Ashvatthama deception

@duryodhana.Name: Duryodhana
Character_Arc: Refused to return kingdom after exile
Led Kaurava army in Kurukshetra War
Killed by Bhima in mace duel on Day 18

@ekalavya.Name: Ekalavya
Character_Arc: Built clay idol of Drona and self-trained
Cut off his thumb as guru-dakshina to Drona

@gandhari.Name: Gandhari
Character_Arc: Blindfolded herself after marrying blind Dhritarashtra
Cursed Krishna for not preventing war

@ghatotkacha.Name: Ghatotkacha
Character_Arc: Born to Bhima and Hidimba in forest
Wreaked havoc on Kaurava forces at night
Killed by Karna's Shakti weapon on Day 14

@jayadratha.Name: Jayadratha
Character_Arc: Tried to abduct Draupadi in forest
Killed by Arjuna before sunset on Day 14

@karna.Name: Karna
Character_Arc: Born to Kunti via Surya - abandoned at birth
Raised by charioteer Adhiratha and Radha
Humiliated at tournament - befriended by Duryodhana
Made King of Anga by Duryodhana
Learned true identity from Kunti before war

@krishna.Name: Krishna
Character_Arc: Born to Devaki and Vasudeva in prison

@kunti.Name: Kunti
Character_Arc: Born as Pritha - adopted by Kuntibhoja
Shared mantra with Madri for Nakula & Sahadeva
Raised Pandavas in Hastinapura after Pandu's death

@nakula.Name: Nakula
Character_Arc: Served as horse-keeper Granthika in Virata

@pandu.Name: Pandu
Character_Arc: Born to Ambalika via Niyoga from Vyasa
Sons born via divine boons of Kunti and Madri
Died from curse when approaching Madri

@sahadeva.Name: Sahadeva
Character_Arc: Served as cowherd Tantipala in Virata

@shakuni.Name: Shakuni
Character_Arc: Vowed revenge against Kuru (for Gandhari's marriage)

@shalya.Name: Shalya
Character_Arc: Tricked by Duryodhana into joining Kauravas
Became last Kaurava commander on Day 18

@vidura.Name: Vidura
Character_Arc: Born to maid via Niyoga from Vyasa

@vyasa.Name: Vyasa
Character_Arc: Born to Parashara and Satyavati on island
Fathered Dhritarashtra, Pandu, Vidura via Niyoga
Witnessed and narrated the great war

@yudhishthira.Name: Yudhishthira
Character_Arc: Crowned King of Hastinapura after war
